headline: Honeywell expands security portfolio in bid to catch AI wave
summary: The company is partnering with Rhombus to integrate AI-driven security into the building systems of its customers as demand for these products surge, a company executive says.

headline: QTUM ETF Explained: How Investors Are Gaining Exposure to Quantum and AI in One Fund
summary: Still confused about quantum investing? A fund like the Defiance Quantum ETF (QTUM) can make it easier to get started. At its core, QTUM is an exchange-traded fund that gives investors access to companies tied to next-gen tech. This includes quantum computing, AI, and advanced chips. Instead of picking one stock, the fund spreads money across many firms in the same space. As of now, QTUM trades near $111 and is up about 42% over the past year. headline: A Look At Honeywell International (HON) Valuation After New Defense Pact And AI Security Partnership
summary: Honeywell International (HON) is back in focus after signing a supplier framework agreement with the U.S. Department of War involving a multi year US$500 million investment to expand critical defense production capacity. See our latest analysis for Honeywell International. The defense agreement and new AI powered building security partnership come as the 90 day share price return sits at 14.09%, while the 1 year total shareholder return is 13.98%. This suggests momentum has recently picked up...

headline: HONEYWELL ANNUAL SHAREOWNERS MEETING SET FOR MAY 22, 2026
summary: Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) announced today it will hold its 2026 Annual Shareowners Meeting at 10:30 a.m. EDT on May 22, 2026, in a virtual format at www.virtualshareholdermeeting.com/HON2026. Shareowners of record at the close of business on Friday, March 27, 2026, will be entitled to vote at the meeting.

headline: Vertical Aerospace Selects Isoclima as Strategic Transparency Partner for Valo
summary: LONDON & NEW YORK, March 27, 2026--Vertical Aerospace ("Vertical" or "Company") [NYSE:EVTL], a global aerospace and technology company that is pioneering electric aviation, today announced it has selected Isoclima S.p.A., a global leader in high performance transparent solutions, as a strategic supplier for the Valo aircraft.
